1001011101101011111110100110110010011101010110100101000110011110111100000001011 - ASI: 31

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  000 = 0 * 00
  0100 = 01 * 00
  1001 = 10 * 01
  1011 = 10 * 11
  1110 = 11 * 10
  01011 = 0 * 1011
  10110 = 1011 * 0
  000000 = 000 * 000
  011001 = 01 * 1001
  101111 = 1011 * 11
  111010 = 1110 * 10
  1001011 = 10 * 01011
  11101111 = 11 * 101111
  100110110 = 1001 * 10110
  101101001 = 10110 * 1001
  0100011001 = 0100 * 011001
  0100111010 = 0100 * 111010
  1011111110 = 101111 * 1110
  00000001011 = 000000 * 01011
  100101110110 = 1001011 * 10110
  1001101100100111010 = 100110110 * 0100111010
  1011010010100011001 = 101101001 * 0100011001
  1110111100000001011 = 11101111 * 00000001011
  1001011101101011111110 = 100101110110 * 1011111110
  10110100101000110011110111100000001011 = 1011010010100011001 * 1110111100000001011
  10010111011010111111101001101100100111010 = 1001011101101011111110 * 1001101100100111010
  1001011101101011111110100110110010011101010110100101000110011110111100000001011 = 10010111011010111111101001101100100111010 * 10110100101000110011110111100000001011
